flags.message: 1 samples have NO assistant turn — nothing to learn from; drop them.
1 samples have an empty assistant turn — teaches the model to output nothing; drop or fix.
1 exact-duplicate samples (16.7%) — inflates those examples / memorization risk; dedup.
1 conversations don't end on an assistant turn — for SFT the last turn should be the assistant response.

1 samples (16.7%) exceed max_len=30 [≈chars/4 (no tokenizer)]; 1 of them end on the assistant turn → its answer gets cut (model learns not to finish). Raise max_len, truncate the prompt side, or filter.
